gomodmerge
stdout 'go.mod merged'
go mod verify
# higher go version must win
grep 'go 1.22.0' go.mod
! grep 'go 1.21.0' go.mod
go run .
stdout 'hello'

-- main.go --
package main

import "fmt"

func main() { fmt.Println("hello") }

-- go.mod --
module a

<<<<<<< HEAD
go 1.21.0
=======
go 1.22.0
>>>>>>> branch

-- go.sum --
